recipes.name: recipes
recipes.description: Ready-made FinOps tracking designs as payload skeletons (tool sequence + frozen context/widgets + placeholders) matched to a user's outcome, then handed off to reports/dashboards/virtual-dimensions/query to build.

virtual-dimensions.name: virtual-dimensions
virtual-dimensions.description: Create, edit, preview, and publish custom cost axes (virtual dimensions) with ordered CEL rules.

dashboards.name: dashboards
dashboards.description: Create or extend Costory dashboards with context-first widget inheritance and interesting-overview generation (suggest_groupby, suggest_usage_metrics, text widgets).

reports.name: reports
reports.description: Design scheduled Slack/Teams/email reports (ask-first) or explain last-month cost with preview-first DIGEST (not query+compare); optional slower AI summary; delivery safety.

query.name: query
query.description: Explore Costory cost, usage, metric, formula, budget, and external-metric data. Explorer PoP only — hand off change-tree "what changed" asks to explain-period-change / reports Explain.

events.name: events
events.description: Correlate cost movements with engineering/business events and annotate cost changes: create_event (with a widget annotation chart), list_events to tie a spike to a deploy/incident, update_event.

recommendations.name: recommendations
recommendations.description: Derive a prioritized, quantified savings action plan analytically from query (effective savings, K8s waste, coverage) — grounded in observed figures, never invented. suggest_actions is UI next-steps only; there is no dedicated recommendation engine.

alerts.name: alerts
alerts.description: Create standing cost alerts / anomaly monitors: preview_alert to backtest a condition (rollingSum/timeShift/…) before create_alert; dedup, destinations-last, create-only (edit in UI).

playbooks.name: playbooks
playbooks.description: Multi-step orchestration across skills/recipes with confirm-gates: spend-spike-triage, monthly-close, allocation-campaign, unit-economics-rollout. For a single-skill outcome use recipes instead.

forecast.name: forecast
forecast.description: Run-rate / budget-pace projection from query actuals (are we on pace to overspend?) and regression detection via alerts. The MCP has no statistical forecast tool — for that, point to Costory's in-product Forecasting with TimesFM. Never fabricate a projected number.

governance.name: governance
governance.description: FinOps policy adherence: allocation-coverage SLOs, budget/commitment coverage, tagging and anomaly policy. Composes untagged-coverage, virtual-dimensions leftover, query H, alerts, reports. Targets are the org's to set — never invent an SLO.

optimization.name: optimization
optimization.description: The analytical method to find and size a cost-reduction lever — rightsizing/idle, commitment coverage, K8s waste — sized from observed query figures. Companion to recommendations (which ranks and presents the plan).

unit-economics.name: unit-economics
unit-economics.description: Cost-per-unit — cost per request, per GB, per delivery, per customer, per token. Cost leg + usage/metric leg + formula a/b, grounded in query Workflow E. Decides KPI-only ratio vs reallocating shared spend (→ reallocate-by-external-metric / virtual-dimensions telemetry).

docs.name: docs
docs.description: Look up Costory product how-to/what-is documentation (search_documentation → get_documentation_page) and point to in-product features the MCP has no tool for (e.g. statistical Forecasting with TimesFM). Never fabricate a doc path or feature.
